title: Manufacturing Engineer - Marico Advisory Limited - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Marico Advisory Limited - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Marico Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Marico Advisory Limited:
Marico Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico Advisory Limited!
